Name: DRAGON TALES
Title: DRAGON TALES
Description:
☘ What does it mean? Let's think about it a little. Dragons, mysterious and powerful creatures of fantasy and science fiction, have captivated the imaginations of readers and viewers for centuries. From folk tales to literature, dragons have become an integral part of our culture.

🍄 Ancient cultures from Babylon to the Greeks and Chinese have their own versions of dragons, each with their unique properties and stories. In Chinese mythology, for example, dragons are symbols of strength and wealth, while in Western culture, they are often perceived as fearsome creatures that must be defeated.

🌙🌞 Let's take a look at some of the most iconic dragons in literature and film. From Smaug the dragon in J.R.R. Tolkien's "The Hobbit" to the terrifying Drogon in HBO's "Game of Thrones," dragons have become an integral part of the fantasy genre. Specifically in this piece of work, there is a reference to the modern series "Carnival Row," as well as to Chinese mythology in the form of the dragon's stylistics, ancient Greek mythology with the Caduceus (a symbol of the key to secret knowledge, enlightenment and vitality) that they guard, and Hindu philosophy in the form of the Mother Goddess who crowns this composition. She is hardly noticeable at first, hidden behind the density of the Tree of Life branches. However, she is the source of all material worlds, all creations, currents, all knowledge, philosophies, fairy tales, legends, myths, and even modern ones. That's why this work is called "Dragon Tales". ✨

Name: SHAMANIC SUN
Title: SHAMANIC SUN
Description:
Shamanic sun is sympol of peruvian mysticism. It is a spiritual practice that has been practiced for centuries in Peru. It is based on the belief that the sun is a powerful force that can be used to heal, protect, and bring good fortune. The practice involves rituals, offerings, and ceremonies to honor the sun and ask for its blessings.

The most important figure in shamanic sun peruvian mysticism is the shaman, who to be able to communicate with the spirit world and heal the sick. Offerings are made to the sun, to ask for its blessings. The shaman also holds leaves and his gaze to the magical Apus of Ausangate, which are believed to be powerful spiritual forces.

The practice of shamanic sun peruvian mysticism also involves journeying to sacred sites and temples, such as Machu Picchu, Cuzco, Ollantaytambo, and Sacsayhuamán. These sites are believed to be powerful places of spiritual energy, and are often used for rituals and ceremonies.

Overall, shamanic sun peruvian mysticism is a spiritual practice that has been practiced for centuries in Peru. It involves rituals, offerings, and ceremonies to honor the sun and ask for its blessings, as well as journeying to sacred sites and using specialy for healing and communication with the spirit world. It is believed to be a powerful tool for healing and communicating with the spirit world.

Name: SUMMERTIME
Title: SUMMERTIME
Description:
"Dance Of Butterfly . Summertime: A Symbolic Tale of Life's Journey"

The fluorescent composition "Dance Of Butterfly" is an enchanting masterpiece that takes us on a symbolic journey of life. The painting portrays moths flying towards a bright light, but they are unsure whether it is a source of life or a destructive force leading them to their demise in a bonfire.

The artwork depicts the delicate beauty of butterflies and moths, as they gracefully dance in the air, drawn to the luminous light that illuminates the summer night. The vibrant colors and intricate details of the painting are a true testament to the beauty and fragility of life.

The moths, in their pursuit of light, represent the journey of life, where we are constantly striving towards something that we perceive as positive, yet it may lead us down a path of uncertainty and confusion. The painting serves as a reminder that the journey of life is not always straightforward and requires careful consideration and reflection to find one's true path.

The artwork's use of fluorescent colors and black background creates a mesmerizing effect, drawing the viewer into the painting's mystical world. The painting evokes a sense of wonder and awe, as we contemplate the moths' journey and the potential outcomes of their pursuit of the light.

In conclusion, "Butterfly Dance. Summertime" is a profound and captivating painting that offers a symbolic representation of life's journey. The painting invites us to reflect on our own lives and the paths we choose to take, reminding us of the delicate balance between light and darkness and the importance of finding our true purpose. This painting is a perfect addition to any art collection or space, serving as a beautiful and thought-provoking reminder of life's journey.

The art composition titled "Thai Chill" is a visual representation of the spiritual and cultural traditions of Thailand. The artwork features a monk sitting in a meditative pose similar to that of the Buddha, surrounded by various spiritual symbols.

One of the central themes of the painting is the depiction of snakes, dragons, and the flower of life. In Thai culture, these symbols represent power, protection, and enlightenment. The snakes in the painting are shown as they intertwine around the monk, symbolizing the eternal cycle of life, death, and rebirth. The dragon, a legendary creature in Thai mythology, is seen as a protector and symbol of good luck. The flower of life, which is a sacred geometrical symbol, represents the interconnectedness of all living things.

The color purple dominates the artwork, which adds to its overall spiritual and mystical aura. In Thai culture, purple is often associated with royalty, wisdom, and spiritual awareness. The use of purple in this composition conveys a sense of peace, calmness, and inner reflection.

The monk depicted in the painting is seen as a symbol of spiritual awakening and enlightenment. He is sitting in a meditative pose with his eyes closed, and his hands resting on his lap. The composition is a beautiful fusion of Thai culture and spirituality, depicted through the use of vivid colors and intricate details. It is a visual representation of the profound spiritual traditions of Thailand, which have been passed down from generation to generation.

Name: GANESHA
Title: GANESHA
Description:
This beautiful tapestry showcases Lord Ganesha, the wise and kind god with an elephant head and the son of Shiva and Parvati. He embodies intelligence, prosperity, and success, and is believed to be a helpful aid for students and anyone seeking new knowledge or skills. In addition to his love for music and dance, he has a sweet tooth for sweets.

As the first among Hindu deities, Ganesha is revered for uniting diverse Hindu traditions into one. According to Hindu mythology, Ganesha emerged victorious in a contest with his brother Skanda, the God of War. The contest involved encircling the universe three times, and Ganesha was declared the winner after he circled his parents Shiva and Parvati, symbolizing that they were his entire universe.

By displaying Lord Ganesha's image in your home, you invite wisdom and well-being into your life. This trippy and psychedelic blacklight india tapestry is an ideal piece of art for meditation decor, UV decoration, and wall decor, making it a perfect addition to your space.
